publicV1.reason: The fix changes only the internal BoxLite native command synchronization path and does not add or alter any Public V1 operation, schema, status code, or error body.

mcp.reason: No MCP tool, argument, result, registration, or transport behavior changes because MCP does not expose the provider-native execution protocol.

openapi.reason: No public HTTP contract changes, so there is no OpenAPI operation or schema projection to regenerate.

apiPlayground.reason: The API Playground has no BoxLite native execution surface and therefore requires no catalog or rendering change.

internalOnly.reason: Changes the internal BoxLite provider state machine so process settlement and output-drain completion are synchronized under one deadline, with deterministic failure semantics, bounded diagnostics, and real-provider regression coverage.
